high.title: Missing Semantic HTML Structure
high.impact: Screen readers cannot navigate page structure effectively

high.title: Image Alternative Text Missing
high.impact: Screen reader users miss critical visual information
high.description: Emoji flags, venue images, and decorative images lack proper alt text

high.title: Focus Management in Custom Dropdowns
high.impact: Keyboard users lose focus context in dropdowns
high.description: Settings, Currency, and Language dropdowns don't trap or restore focus properly

high.title: Low Contrast Text Elements
high.impact: Users with visual impairments cannot read content
high.description: Inactive nav items and muted text don't meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio

high.title: Missing Loading States in ExploreScreen
high.impact: Users have no feedback during data loading
high.description: No skeleton states for tip cards and filtered results

high.title: Chat Real-time States Missing
high.impact: Users cannot track message status or connection state
high.description: No loading, error, or connection status for messaging

high.title: Property Data Error Handling
high.impact: Users see blank screens when property data fails to load
high.description: No error states for property/location data failures

high.title: Chart Data Visualization Accessibility
high.impact: Chart data completely inaccessible to screen readers
high.description: Charts lack text alternatives and keyboard navigation

medium.title: Form Input Label Association
medium.impact: Screen readers cannot identify input purpose
medium.description: Some inputs rely on placeholder text instead of proper labels

medium.title: Loading State Announcements
medium.impact: Users unaware of application state changes
medium.description: Loading states not announced to screen readers via aria-live

medium.title: Empty States for Filtered Results
medium.impact: Users don't understand why no results appear
medium.description: No empty states when filters return no results

medium.title: Network Error Recovery
medium.impact: Users cannot recover from network failures
medium.description: No retry mechanisms or offline handling

medium.title: Keyboard Navigation for Image Carousels
medium.impact: Keyboard users cannot navigate image galleries

medium.title: Form Submission Loading States
medium.impact: Users don't know if form submissions are processing
medium.description: No loading indicators for profile updates

medium.title: Table Data Accessibility
medium.impact: Data tables lack proper headers and relationships
medium.description: Tables need proper th elements and scope attributes

medium.title: GPS/Location Error Handling
medium.impact: Users stuck when location services fail
medium.description: No fallbacks for GPS failures or location permission denied

medium.title: Color-Only Information
medium.impact: Color blind users miss status information
medium.description: Some status information conveyed only through color

medium.title: Optimistic Update Feedback
medium.description: Immediate feedback needed for user actions

medium.title: Skip Links for Navigation
medium.impact: Keyboard users must tab through all navigation
medium.description: Missing skip to main content links

medium.title: Background Sync Indicators
medium.impact: Users unaware of background data synchronization
medium.description: No indication when app syncs data in background

low.title: Enhanced ARIA Landmarks
low.impact: Minor navigation improvements for screen readers
low.description: Add more specific landmarks like banner, contentinfo

low.title: Heading Hierarchy Improvements
low.description: Some heading levels could be more logical

low.title: Language Attributes
low.description: Add lang attributes for multi-language content

low.title: Progressive Enhancement for Animations
low.impact: Users with vestibular disorders may be affected

low.title: Tooltip Accessibility Enhancement
low.impact: Tooltip content may not be fully accessible
low.description: Ensure tooltips work with keyboard and screen readers

low.title: Advanced Loading Patterns
low.impact: Enhanced user experience for slow connections
low.description: Implement progressive loading and skeleton improvements
